parameters.query:
INSERT INTO email_logs (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, error_msg)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id }}',
  '{{ $json.email_subject }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender }}', 'null'),
  NOW(),
  'skipped',
  '非面試類信件'
)
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO email_logs (
  email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, candidate_id
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.received_at || '' }}', '')::TIMESTAMPTZ, NOW()),
  'inserted',
  {{ $json.candidate_id }}
)
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET
  action = 'updated',
  processed_at = NOW();

SELECT 
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id,
  'inserted/updated' AS log_action;

INSERT INTO interviews (
  candidate_id, interview_date, interview_time, round,
  location, hr_owner, status, email_subject, email_msg_id, email_web_link
)
SELECT
  {{ $json.candidate_id }},
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_date || '' }}', ''), 'null')::DATE,
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_time || '' }}', ''), 'null'),
  {{ $json.round || 1 }},
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ ($json.location || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), 'null'),
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ ($json.hr_owner || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''), 'null'),
  '{{ $json.status || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.email_web_link || '' }}', ''), 'null')
WHERE '{{ $json.intent || '' }}' NOT IN ('update_time', 'cancel', 'recommend', 'request_invite')
  AND NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_date || '' }}', ''), 'null') IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = EXCLUDED.status;

UPDATE interviews SET
  interview_date = NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_date || '' }}', ''), 'null')::DATE,
  interview_time = NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_time || '' }}', ''), 'null')
WHERE candidate_id = {{ $json.candidate_id }}
  AND round = {{ $json.round || 1 }}
  AND '{{ $json.intent || '' }}' = 'update_time'
  AND NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_date || '' }}', ''), 'null') IS NOT NULL;

UPDATE interviews SET
  status = 'cancelled'
WHERE candidate_id = {{ $json.candidate_id }}
  AND round = {{ $json.round || 1 }}
  AND '{{ $json.intent || '' }}' = 'cancel';

SELECT
  {{ $json.candidate_id }} AS candidate_id,
  '{{ ($json.candidate_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS candidate_name,
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id,
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS email_subject,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', 'null') AS sender,
  '{{ $json.received_at || '' }}' AS received_at,
  '{{ $json.status || '' }}' AS status;

INSERT INTO candidates (name, applied_position, department, source, status)
SELECT
  '{{ ($json.candidate_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.applied_position || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.department || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'Outlook即時',
  '{{ $json.status || '' }}'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM candidates WHERE name = '{{ ($json.candidate_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);

UPDATE candidates
SET status = '{{ $json.status || '' }}'
WHERE name = '{{ ($json.candidate_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}';

SELECT
  c.id AS candidate_id,
  '{{ ($json.candidate_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS candidate_name,
  '{{ $json.interview_date || '' }}' AS interview_date,
  '{{ $json.interview_time || '' }}' AS interview_time,
  {{ $json.round || 1 }} AS round,
  '{{ ($json.location || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS location,
  '{{ ($json.hr_owner || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS hr_owner,
  '{{ $json.interview_status || 'scheduled' }}' AS status,
  '{{ $json.intent || '' }}' AS intent,
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS email_subject,
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}' AS email_msg_id,
  '{{ $json.email_web_link || '' }}' AS email_web_link,
  '{{ $json.sender || '' }}' AS sender,
  '{{ $json.received_at || '' }}' AS received_at
FROM candidates c
WHERE c.name = '{{ ($json.candidate_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.item.json;
return {
  model: "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  max_tokens: 500,
  system: "你是 HR 信件解析助手，從面試信件中萃取結構化資訊，輸出純 JSON 不含多餘文字。
HR 人員：李沛晴（Peggy）、陳清彥（Yen）、黃友為（Evan）

輸出欄位：
- candidate_name: 候選人姓名（優先從主旨取，主旨無法確定才從內文找）
- applied_position: 應徵職位（找不到填「未知職位」）
- department: 部門（找不到填「未分類」）
- interview_date: YYYY-MM-DD（主管「建議約在...」代表未確認填 null；只有已確認才填）
- interview_time: HH:MM（同上規則）
- round: 第幾輪（數字，預設 1）
- location: 面試地點
- hr_owner: 負責 HR 姓名
- status: 狀態描述（待HR邀約 / 面試已安排 / 已推薦 等）
- intent: recommend|request_invite|schedule|update_time|cancel|second_schedule|other
- ai_action_item: HR 待辦一句話（無則 null）",
  messages: [
    {
      role: "user",
      content: "主旨：" + item.email_subject + "

" + item.body_text
    }
  ]
};

conditions.rightValue: .*(面試|面談|初試|複試|面試通知|面談通知|interview|履歷推薦).*
